description_long: A seated adult figure with a medium build is depicted wearing a loose, long-sleeved tunic that drapes over the body and legs. The individual has a full beard and long, textured hair that extends down the back, giving a rugged and natural appearance. The hands are resting on the knees, with fingers slightly curled, and the posture is upright but relaxed, suggesting a meditative or contemplative state. The facial expression is serious and focused, with prominent eyebrows and defined facial features. The feet are not visible, as they are covered by the garment, and the overall form is solid and lifelike. The figure appears to be modeled as a single, continuous piece with no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A seated adult with long hair and a beard, dressed in a loose, long-sleeved tunic, hands resting on knees in a contemplative pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, beard, and both hands resting on the knees, with the tunic draped over the body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length and texture of the hair, and the relaxed arm posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the hair down the back and the broad drape of the tunic over the shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the face, the arm position, and the way the tunic falls over the legs.
